modules.name: Installing and Configuring macOS
modules.description: macOS architecture, installation methods, Recovery System, and initial setup.

lessons.title: Installing and Configuring macOS
topics: Introduction to macOS architecture and deployment
Installing and upgrading macOS
Using the macOS Recovery System
Performing initial system setup and configuration

modules.name: Managing macOS User Accounts
modules.description: Local and network user accounts, home folders, security, privacy, and keychain access.

lessons.title: Managing macOS User Accounts
topics: Creating and managing local and network user accounts
Understanding user home folders and directory structure
Managing user security and privacy settings
Configuring user permissions and keychain access

modules.name: Managing macOS File Systems and Storage
modules.description: APFS, partitions, volumes, FileVault encryption, and file permissions.

lessons.title: Managing macOS File Systems and Storage
topics: Apple File System (APFS) and supported file systems
Creating, managing, and resizing partitions and volumes
Using FileVault and encryption tools
Managing file ownership and permission schemes

modules.name: macOS Data Management
modules.description: System resources, Spotlight, metadata, Time Machine backups, and archiving.

lessons.title: macOS Data Management
topics: System resource locations and folder structure
Spotlight, metadata indexing, and smart folders
Setting up and managing Time Machine backups
Archiving strategies and data retention

modules.name: Managing macOS Apps and Processes
modules.description: App installation and security, Gatekeeper, process monitoring, Activity Monitor, and diagnostics.

lessons.title: Managing macOS Apps and Processes
topics: Installing and managing apps (App Store and third-party)
Gatekeeper, Notarization, and app sandboxing
Monitoring and controlling background processes
Using Activity Monitor and Console for diagnostics
Troubleshooting common app and system issues

modules.name: Configuring macOS Networking
modules.description: Network configuration, Wi-Fi, Ethernet, VPN, DNS, troubleshooting, and local network services.

lessons.title: Configuring macOS Networking
topics: Networking concepts relevant to macOS
Network preferences and configuration interfaces
Initial and advanced network configuration (Wi-Fi, Ethernet, VPN)
Network troubleshooting using built-in tools
Configuring local network services (AirDrop, screen sharing)

modules.name: macOS System Management
modules.description: Peripherals, printers, startup modes, system initialization, and Terminal basics.

lessons.title: macOS System Management
topics: Adding and configuring peripherals (Bluetooth, external storage)
Printer setup and management
macOS system initialization process
Startup modes (Safe Boot, Verbose Mode, Recovery)
macOS command-line environment (Terminal basics)

modules.name: Capstone Lab & Review
modules.description: Scenario-based activity combining all course skills.

lessons.title: Capstone Lab
topics: Scenario-based activity combining user setup, network config, app management, and data backup
Troubleshooting common issues across multiple lessons

modules.name: Final Assessment
modules.description: Quiz, capstone challenge, and course completion.

lessons.title: Final Assessment
topics: Recap and key takeaways
Final quiz (10 questions)
Capstone challenge: scenario-based onboarding task
Feedback and completion

assessment.title: macOS Administration Final Assessment
items: Capstone challenge: configure a new MacBook (encryption, VPN, apps, backup)
Scoring rubric: completeness, accuracy, troubleshooting logic, security awareness (20 points)
